column.text:
• Seattle Mariners placed LF Randy Arozarena on the 10-day injured list with a left hamstring strain.
• Seattle Mariners placed 3B Will Wilson on the 60-day injured list.
• Chicago Cubs placed RHP Daniel Palencia on the 15-day injured list with right elbow inflammation.
• New York Mets designated SS Vidal Bruján for assignment.
• Los Angeles Dodgers designated 3B Santiago Espinal for assignment.
• Milwaukee Brewers sent RHP Brandon Woodruff on a rehab assignment to Wisconsin Timber Rattlers.
• Miami Marlins sent RHP Eury Pérez on a rehab assignment to Jacksonville Jumbo Shrimp.
• New York Mets activated RHP Kodai Senga from the 15-day injured list.
• Houston Astros activated RHP Hunter Brown from the 60-day injured list.
• Baltimore Orioles activated RHP Ryan Helsley from the 15-day injured list.

x_article.title: MLB Daily Recap
